creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to NoahD from comment #37)

> … not able to use the legacy BIOS boot for nvme. …

(In reply to NoahD from comment #41)

> … 14.0-CURRENT #1 plus-RELENG_23_05-n256102-7cd3d043045: Mon 
> May 22 15:33:52 UTC 2023 …


Can you try the most recent 14.0-CURRENT?

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/bdc81eeda05d3af80254f6aac95759b07f13f2b7> (2023-06-13) was eye-catching, although I can't tell whether it's relevant to a case such as yours. 

----

bdc81eeda05d3af80254f6aac95759b07f13f2b7 is not yet in <https://github.com/pfsense/FreeBSD-src/commits/devel-main>.
